<HUAWEI-SWITCH-01>display ip routing-table pro bgp
Proto: Protocol        Pre: Preference
Route Flags: R - relay, D - download to fib, T - to vpn-instance, B - black hole route
------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Routing Table : _public_
         Destinations : 4        Routes : 5
Destination/Mask    Proto   Pre  Cost        Flags NextHop                                  Interface
       10.0.0.0/24  BGP  60   0             RD  192.168.1.1                             GigabitEthernet0/0/1
       10.0.1.0/24  IBGP  60   0             RD  192.168.1.2                            GigabitEthernet0/0/2
       10.0.2.0/24  EBGP  60   100           RD  192.168.1.3                            GigabitEthernet0/0/3
       10.0.3.0/24  BGP  60   0             RD  192.168.1.4                            GigabitEthernet0/0/4
                    BGP  60   0             RD  192.168.1.5                            Eth-Trunk1
       10.0.4.0/24  BGP  60   0             RD  192.168.1.6                            GigabitEthernet0/0/5
